response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, including Java and JVM-related work in past roles, but his recent focus is heavily on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with minimal evidence of deep, current involvement in enterprise Java tooling, Spring, or IDE internals — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Proven experience with Java in past roles (e.g., NI LabWindows, robotic arms)
Strong open-source contributions and tooling passion (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Excellent communication and teaching skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: Recent work is dominated by TypeScript/Node.js, with no clear recent JVM or Spring ecosystem contributions
Lacks explicit experience with IDE internals, language servers, or build tool integration (e.g., Maven/Gradle)
No evidence of involvement with application servers, Hibernate, or enterprise framework tooling in last 5 years
